page_classifications.reason: The target page contains typical invoice elements such as 'Invoice Number', 'Bill To', 'Invoice Date', 'Payment Terms', and 'Amount Due'. It also includes a reference number and page numbering, indicating it is the beginning of a multi-page invoice.
The target page continues the invoice with consistent invoice number, reference, and page numbering.
The target page continues the invoice with the same invoice number and includes the 'END OF DOCUMENT' notation, indicating it is the final page of the current invoice.

The target page introduces a new Medical Record with a distinct Medical Record Number (MRN-1102726) and contains patient information, visit details, and diagnosis, indicating the start of a new logical document.

The target page continues the medical record with the same Medical Record Number (MRN-1102726) and includes additional physician notes and prescriptions, indicating it is a continuation of the prior document.

The target page contains elements typical of a receipt, such as 'PAYMENT RECEIPT', 'Transaction ID', 'Paid', 'Subtotal', 'Tax', and 'Total'. It also has a different reference number (1103726) compared to the previous document (1102726), indicating a new document.
